name: connect-app
description: Desktop remote connection launcher with Windows/Linux profiles and utility installers.

scripts.check: node --check src/main/main.js && node --check src/main/store.js && node --check src/main/remote.js && node --check src/main/port-forward-manager.js && node --check src/main/programs.js && node --check src/preload.js && node --check src/helpers/ssh-terminal.js && node --check src/renderer/app.js
